title: Niger Audio SHEO
transcript:
Interviewer: Can you describe what usually affects retention after training?

Participant: The main issue is not only salary. Supervisors, workload, transport, and whether the facility has the tools we need all affect motivation.
translation:
Interviewer: Can you describe what usually affects retention after training?

Participant: The main issue is not only salary. Supervisors, workload, transport, and whether the facility has the tools we need all affect motivation.

title: CSOs LSN LRN ENG
transcript:

title: IDI - referral transport coordinator
transcript: Participant: The ambulance is sometimes available, but communication between the primary facility and referral hospital can delay movement.
translation: Participant: The ambulance is sometimes available, but communication between the primary facility and referral hospital can delay movement.
